title: Annual Leave
content: Employees receive 18 days of annual leave per calendar year. Unused annual leave may be carried forward up to 5 days into the next year. All leave requests require manager approval at least 3 business days in advance. Emergency leave may be requested with same-day manager approval.

title: Business Travel
content: Domestic business travel must be pre-approved by your manager. International travel requires director-level approval submitted at least 14 days in advance. Employees should book economy class unless the flight exceeds 6 hours. Per diem rates follow the company travel schedule.

title: Expense Reimbursement
content: Employees must submit expense claims within 30 days of incurring the cost. All claims require itemized receipts. Meals during business travel are reimbursed up to $75 per day. Personal expenses are not reimbursable. Finance reviews claims within 5 business days.
